/CAL:BIFURCATED WI 6602 PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DAWT/WIT SWORN:DR, THOMAS MACSPEIDEN/X:THE MATTER CAME BEFORE THE COURT FOR A PROBABLE CAUSE HEARINGON 08-09-13 & 10-25-13,  ON EACH OCCASION, THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT PRESENT AND WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANZ FUETSCH, ESQ,/X:BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT FINDS THERE IS PROBABLE  CAUSE TO BELIEVE THAT: THE RESPONDENTHAS BEEN CONVICTED OF A  QUALIFYING SEXUALLY VIOLENT OFFENSE AGAINST AT LEAST ONE VICTIM; HAS A DIAGNOSABLE MENTAL DISORDER; THE DISORDER MAKES IT LIKELY HE WILL ENGAGE IN SEXUALLY VIOLENT CRIMINAL CONDUCT IF RELEASED; AND THIS  SEXUALLY VIOLENT CRIMINAL CONDUCT WILL BE PREDATORY IN NATURE,/X:RESPONDENT REQUESTS A JURY TRIAL, THE COURT HEREBY ORDERS THAT A TRIAL BE CONDUCTED TO DETERMINE WHETHER RESPONDENT IS, BY REASON OF A DIAGNOSED MENTAL DISORDER, A DANGER TO THE HEALTH AND SAFETY OF OTHERS IN THAT HE IS LIKELY TOENGAGE IN ACTS OF PREDATORY SEXUAL VIOLENCE  UPON HIS RELEASE FROM A SECURE FACILITY,/X:IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT REMAIN IN CUSTODY UNTILTHE TRIAL IS COMPLETED,  SPECIFICALLY, RESPONDENT SHALL REMAIN AT EITHER COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL OR ANY OTHER DESIGNATED CALIFORNIA STATE HOSPITAL ORINSTITUTION PENDING TRIAL IN THIS MATTER,/CONTD:TO SET TRIAL/

docket_entries.docketEntryComment: /CAL:BIFURCATED WI 6602 PROBABLE CAUSE HEARING/DAWT/WIT SWORN:DR, THOMAS MACSPEIDEN/X:THE MATTER CAME BEFORE THE COURT FOR A PROBABLE CAUSE HEARINGON 08-09-13 & 10-25-13,  ON EACH OCCASION, THE RESPONDENT WAS NOT PRESENT AND WAS REPRESENTED BY FRANZ FUETSCH, ESQ,/X:BASED ON THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED, THE COURT FINDS THERE IS PROBABLE  CAUSE TO BELIEVE THAT: THE RESPONDENTHAS BEEN CONVICTED OF A  QUALIFYING SEXUALLY VIOLENT OFFENSE AGAINST AT LEAST ONE VICTIM; HAS A DIAGNOSABLE MENTAL DISORDER; THE DISORDER MAKES IT LIKELY HE WILL ENGAGE IN SEXUALLY VIOLENT CRIMINAL CONDUCT IF RELEASED; AND THIS  SEXUALLY VIOLENT CRIMINAL CONDUCT WILL BE PREDATORY IN NATURE,/X:RESPONDENT REQUESTS A JURY TRIAL, THE COURT HEREBY ORDERS THAT A TRIAL BE CONDUCTED TO DETERMINE WHETHER RESPONDENT IS, BY REASON OF A DIAGNOSED MENTAL DISORDER, A DANGER TO THE HEALTH AND SAFETY OF OTHERS IN THAT HE IS LIKELY TOENGAGE IN ACTS OF PREDATORY SEXUAL VIOLENCE  UPON HIS RELEASE FROM A SECURE FACILITY,/X:IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT RESPONDENT REMAIN IN CUSTODY UNTILTHE TRIAL IS COMPLETED,  SPECIFICALLY, RESPONDENT SHALL REMAIN AT EITHER COALINGA STATE HOSPITAL OR ANY OTHER DESIGNATED CALIFORNIA STATE HOSPITAL ORINSTITUTION PENDING TRIAL IN THIS MATTER,/CONTD:TO SET TRIAL/
